title: Test Event
description: Live Radio DFW heads to FRESH by Brookshire's in Fate, TX for a Saturday evening of live music. We'll be playing our mix of 70s, 80s, classic rock, and oldies covers across the set. A solid night out for the Fate, TX crowd and the surrounding DFW Metroplex communities.
note: pending.json was empty (sync ran from Windows checkout before d2a22f6); draft sourced from alert email body, token verified via sync_lib.approval_token | Stripped [DRAFT ...] flag prefix on publish (build_show_pages.py treats [DRAFT-prefixed text as not-yet-approved).
